name: Treasury Wine Estates Limited
analysis: TWE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 41% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.8900, stop A$3.9897, target A$5.3900 (0.56:1) — then trail it.
